# aikido_users (Data Source)

Lists users in the Aikido workspace, with optional filters.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `include_inactive` (Boolean) Include inactive users in the results. Defaults to `false`.
- `team_id` (String) Filter users by team ID. Only returns users that are members of this team.

### Read-Only

- `users` (Attributes List) The list of users. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--users))

<a id="nestedatt--users"></a>
### Nested Schema for `users`

Read-Only:

- `active` (Boolean) Whether the user is active.
- `auth_type` (String) The authentication type of the user (e.g., saml).
- `email` (String) The email address of the user.
- `full_name` (String) The full name of the user.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the user.
- `role` (String) The role of the user (e.g., admin, default, team_only).
